---
date: 2025-03-26
draft: false
categories: [announcement]
image: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1620924049153-4d32fcbe88fe?q=80&w=2942&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.0.3&ixid=M3wxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8fA%3D%3D
---

# New Website!

[juliafordatascience.com](../index.qmd) has changed its tech stack.  While a very cool platform, we decided to move off the [Ghost.org](https://ghost.org) platform and rely solely on open source tools.  We're going all in on [Quarto](https://quarto.org).  Why?

1. **No Vendor Lock-In:** We don't want to be locked into a proprietary platfrom.
2. **Version Control:** There's no method of versioning in Ghost.  Quarto uses an extension of markdown.
3. **Cost:** Ghost is a yearly subscription.  Quarto is free and MIT-licensed.
4. **Customization:** Quarto is easier to customize and build/use extensions.
